name: loan-amount-derived-from-ltv-fallback
anchor: F1.LA missing-source fallback (derived from PV × LTV)
rationale: Broker email states target LTV (65%) and property value ($720k) but does NOT state explicit loan_amount. loan_application doc has empty loan_amount field. F1.LA missing-source fallback: derive loan_amount from property_value × LTV = $468,000. Tests Vienna's behavior when canonical_map fields are absent from all primary sources and must derive from related fields.
notes: Single-event sequence. Missing loan_application doc per DS=M1; substituted with appraisal + mortgage_statement only. Phase 4 spec: derive vs flag-as-missing is the expected-behavior question.
